all.en: After my dog of fourteen years passed away, my apartment felt unbearably quiet.
all.zh: 我養了十四年的狗離世後，我的公寓變得安靜得讓人難以忍受。

all.en: A coworker mentioned that the city shelter on Beining Road always needed weekend volunteers.
all.zh: 一位同事提到北寧路的市立收容所每個週末都缺志工。

all.en: I hesitated for several weeks because the idea of being near other dogs hurt me.
all.zh: 我猶豫了好幾週，因為光是想到要靠近其他狗就讓我心痛。

all.en: Eventually I filled out the online form and signed up for a Saturday orientation.
all.zh: 最後我還是填了線上表單，報名了週六的志工說明會。

all.en: The volunteer coordinator, Ms. Yang, was patient and explained every task very clearly.
all.zh: 志工協調人楊小姐很有耐心，把每項任務都解釋得很清楚。

all.en: We learned how to safely approach a frightened animal without scaring it further.
all.zh: 我們學了如何安全地接近受驚嚇的動物，而不讓牠更害怕。

all.en: My first task was simply to refill water bowls in the long corridor of kennels.
all.zh: 我的第一個任務只是替長廊上一排排狗舍的水碗加水。

all.en: Some dogs barked loudly, while others curled up silently in the back of their cages.
all.zh: 有些狗大聲吠叫，有些則靜靜地蜷縮在籠子的後方。

all.en: The silent ones broke my heart the most because their eyes had given up hope.
all.zh: 那些不出聲的狗最讓我心碎，因為牠們的眼神已經放棄希望。

all.en: There was an old beagle named Toby who had been at the shelter for eleven months.
all.zh: 有一隻名叫 Toby 的老米格魯，已經在收容所待了十一個月。

all.en: I sat outside his kennel for an hour, not speaking, just letting him watch me.
all.zh: 我在他的狗舍外坐了一個小時，沒說話，只是讓他看著我。

all.en: By my third visit, Toby came to the gate and pushed his nose against my hand.
all.zh: 到了我第三次來訪時，Toby 走到門口，用鼻子貼著我的手。

all.en: I felt something melt inside me that had been frozen since my own dog died.
all.zh: 我自己的狗離世後就凍結的某種感覺，在那一刻融化了。

all.en: Walking shelter dogs was the next step, and the staff matched me with calm ones.
all.zh: 下一步是帶收容所的狗散步，工作人員幫我配對了個性溫和的狗。

all.en: We strolled around a small park behind the building, one careful loop at a time.
all.zh: 我們在建築物後方的小公園散步，一圈圈小心地走著。

all.en: I learned that even ten minutes of fresh air changed a dog's mood for hours.
all.zh: 我發現即使只是十分鐘的新鮮空氣，也能改變一隻狗好幾個小時的心情。

all.en: Some volunteers focused on cats, especially the shy ones hiding in the upper rooms.
all.zh: 有些志工專注於照顧貓，特別是躲在樓上房間裡害羞的那些。

all.en: Others handled paperwork or photographed animals for the shelter's adoption website.
all.zh: 其他志工則處理文件，或為收容所的領養網站拍攝動物照片。

all.en: I tried photography one weekend and surprised myself with how much I enjoyed it.
all.zh: 有個週末我試了攝影，結果發現自己竟然非常喜歡這件事。

all.en: A good photo could mean the difference between months of waiting and a quick adoption.
all.zh: 一張好的照片可能就是等待數月與快速被領養之間的差別。

all.en: Toby finally got adopted by a retired teacher named Mr. Chou in early March.
all.zh: Toby 終於在三月初被一位退休教師周老師領養了。

all.en: I cried in the parking lot afterward, partly happy and partly missing him already.
all.zh: 之後我在停車場哭了，一部分是高興，一部分是已經開始想念他。

all.en: Mr. Chou sent me a photo of Toby sleeping on his couch one week later.
all.zh: 一週後，周老師傳給我一張 Toby 在他沙發上睡覺的照片。

all.en: The shelter offered a training course for handling animals with behavior issues.
all.zh: 收容所開了一門課程，教大家如何處理有行為問題的動物。

all.en: I signed up immediately and spent six weekends learning from a professional trainer.
all.zh: 我立刻報名，花了六個週末跟著一位專業訓練師學習。

all.en: We covered body language, reward timing, and how to read warning signs early.
all.zh: 我們學了肢體語言、獎勵的時機，以及如何及早察覺警訊。

all.en: I started working with dogs that other volunteers were not yet ready to handle.
all.zh: 我開始接觸那些其他志工還沒準備好處理的狗。

all.en: There were setbacks, including one bite on my forearm that needed three stitches.
all.zh: 過程中也有挫折，包括一次咬傷我前臂，最後縫了三針。

all.en: Even that experience taught me to slow down and respect each animal's pace.
all.zh: 連那次經驗都教會了我放慢腳步，尊重每隻動物自己的節奏。

all.en: A year into volunteering, the shelter asked me to lead the new-volunteer orientation.
all.zh: 在我擔任志工滿一年時，收容所請我主持新志工的說明會。

all.en: Speaking in front of strangers had always terrified me my whole life.
all.zh: 在陌生人面前說話一直是我這輩子最害怕的事。

all.en: Somehow, talking about animals made the nerves disappear almost completely.
all.zh: 不知怎麼地，談起動物的時候，緊張感幾乎完全消失了。

all.en: Now I lead orientations once a month, and I have trained over forty new volunteers.
all.zh: 現在我每個月主持一次說明會，已經培訓了四十多位新志工。

all.en: I came to the shelter to fill a quiet apartment after losing my dog.
all.zh: 我來收容所，是為了填補失去愛犬後寧靜的公寓。

all.en: I stayed because the shelter quietly filled the empty places inside me instead.
all.zh: 我留下來，是因為收容所反過來悄悄填滿了我內心的空缺。
